title: Vintage Velvet Coffin
description: 1970s retro style. Velvet-lined interior. Slightly used for a stage play, in excellent shape. Pick up only.

title: Half-Used Birthday Candles
description: A random cardboard box full of candles. Mostly half-used, some only lit for 5 seconds. Perfect for birthdays on a budget.

title: Haunted Victorian Doll
description: Genuine porcelain doll. Inherited from a strange aunt. Whispers softly at 3 AM. Needs a new home immediately.

title: Fresh Rocky Mountain Air
description: Authentic fresh air collected in a mason jar in Banff, Alberta. Feel the mountain breeze in your home. Cap is tightly sealed.

title: Backyard Dirt (You Dig It)
description: Free high-quality organic soil from my garden. Bring your own shovel and buckets. Take as much as you can dig out.
